author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Persona 4 Revival Broadcast Livestream
Join us for the Persona 4 Revival Broadcast on June 18 at 4pm PT. The broadcast will spotlight Persona 4 Revival’s story, characters, battle system, and more.

Persona 4 Revival goes on air February 18th, 2027 on Xbox, Steam, and PlayStation!

#persona4revival #persona #gaming

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
GTA 6 (Grand Theft Auto VI) - Official Cover Art Reveal Trailer
Pre-orders for Grand Theft Auto VI will officially begin on June 25 on digital storefronts and at other select retailers.
 
Vice City, USA.

Jason and Lucia have always known the deck is stacked against them. But when an easy score goes wrong, they find themselves on the darkest side of the sunniest place in America, in the middle of a conspiracy stretching across the state of Leonida — forced to rely on each other more than ever if they want to make it out alive

#grandtheftauto #gta #gta6 #grandtheftautovi #gtaiv #gaming #videogames #videojuegos

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Street Fighter 6 - Yasmine Character Gameplay Reveal Trailer
Hailing from the Philippines, Yasmine will rush you down with her skills in Eskrima on August 3!

Pay close attention to her movement lest you be on the wrong side of her karambit.

Yasmine can be purchased individually with Fighter Coins and the owners of the Year 4 Character Pass / Ultimate Pass will automatically get access to her when she releases.

#StreetFighter6 #SF6 #Capcom #Yasmine #Capcom #gaming #gameplay
